titleStmt.title: SII 8.327: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 327. (A.R. No. 52 of 1903). ON THE SAME WALL.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . komāṟapaṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkaravarttikaḷ śrīvikkiramapāṇṭiyatevarkku yāṇṭu muṉṟā
vatu taimmātattu Orunāḷ Uṭaiyār tiruviraṭṭāṉamuṭaiya nāyaṉār tevatāṉam ciṟuvākūril toppu
maranilai taṉmi comaṉātatevaṉ tiruttoppum Itaṉ kiḻakku nāṅkaḷ Uḷppaṭṭa nilaṅkalḷum paḻan tirunāmattukkāṇi
yāka potukiṟa nilaṅkaḷ nikki piṉpu Ūraṭaṅkalum nattam Uḷppaṭa tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka koṇṭa Ivaiyiṟṟil co
ḻakulavallinallūr meyūr malaiyaṅkiḻāṉ maṉṟilkuṉikkumperumāṉṉāṉa Apimāṉatuṅkap pallavaraiyar koṇ
ṭuviṭ ṭāṭṭopāti Iṟaimikutikku Ivar ceyvvitta maṉṟikkuṉikkumperumāṉtirunantavaṉattukku maṭaiāḷ U
ḷppaṭa Āḷ nālukku mutallaṭaṅkallum Iṟaiyili civitamāka nālumā nilamum nāḷ Onṟukku tirukkoy
yilile Eḻunāḻi Aricic coṟum Iṭuvatākavum Ivvāṇṭai taimātattu Aṭaittukkuṭuk
kaiyil Iṉṉilam nālumāvum paṟṟikkoḷḷum Iṭattu Ivvūr Ūr nattattukkume meṟkku Uḷḷuūr
Uṭaiyār pukalokacuntiracolḷicuramuṭaiyārkku tirukkoyilukku vaṭakkupaṭṭa viḷainilam vaṭa
kkaṭaiyaturavu Uḷppaṭa kuḻi Iraṇṭāyirattiṉāl nilam nālumāvum tāṉ veṇṭum payir ceytukoṇṭu mutalaṭaṅkalum Iṟaiyili
yākak koṇṭu Ittirunantavaṉattil tiruppaḷḷittāmam tiruppūmaṇṭapattil Aḷakkavum Ippaṭikku cantirātittavaraiyum celvatāka kal
veṭṭikkuṭuttom Ikkoyil tāṉattārom .
Digital edition of SII 8.327 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
